originalTitle: South Africa's long-serving former defence minister and former Robben Island prisoner dies
title: South Africa's long-serving former defence minister and former Robben Island prisoner dies
content: Mosiuoa Lekota was imprisoned with former South African President Nelson Mandela on Robben Island.

originalTitle: Ethiopia experiments with 'smart' police stations that have no officers
title: Ethiopia experiments with 'smart' police stations that have no officers
content: A project to introduce unmanned sites is part of a broader adoption of digital technologies.

originalTitle: UK to stop study visas from Cameroon and Sudan due to 'abuse'
title: UK to stop study visas from Cameroon and Sudan due to 'abuse'
content: The government will end study visas from Afghanistan, Cameroon, Myanmar and Sudan, due to what she says is abuse.

title: Texas Senate race: Democrat Talarico wins; GOP’s Cornyn, Paxton in run-off
content: Winner of May run-off between Republicans John Cornyn and Ken Paxton to face Democrat James Talarico.

title: Iran’s Women’s Asian Cup team have ‘so much concern’ for families back home
content: Players contesting the Women's Asian Cup in Australia share fears for loved ones at home amid US-Israeli attacks.

title: After Iran’s warning, Europe fails to unite on war launched by US, Israel
content: The bloc is split over how to respond, but some EU members are rallying around the concept of mutual defence.

title: Gas and oil prices soar and shares tumble on fears conflict could escalate
content: Markets react as the conflict in the Middle East intensifies and concerns grow over how long it will last.

content: Spain's prime minister delivers a strong rebuttal to US President Donald Trump's threat to end trade with his country.

title: 'Same old story' for Slot as Wolves 'keep fighting'
content: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot began the week by saying he found most Premier League games no longer a joy to watch - and had little to enjoy as he described defeat at Wolves as the "same old story".

title: Man Utd eye wingers, after getting rid under Amorim
content: Manchester United are likely to look at signing a left winger this summer even though former head coach Ruben Amorim spent three windows getting rid of them.

title: 'It's better to be chased' - the mentality of a title race
content: The Premier League title race is set to go to the wire. BBC Sport has spoken to former winners to find out how players deal with the pressure.
